props.ChoiceText: You turned a near-disaster into a quieter disgrace, which at court counts as a form of brilliance.
props.ChoiceBio: Managing a scandal taught you that the court rewards those who can arrange shame into tolerable shapes.

0.TransitionText: Because managing a scandal taught you that the court rewards those who can arrange shame into tolerable shapes, you became indispensable to courtly life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because managing a scandal taught you that the court rewards those who can arrange shame into tolerable shapes, more deliberate harm ceased to seem remote.
1.TransitionPrompt: Handling scandal so well made more deliberate harm feel possible. Do you step into that shadowed trade, or remain in courtly service?

2.TransitionText: Because managing a scandal taught you that the court rewards those who can arrange shame into tolerable shapes, influence could narrow into the private authority of running a great household.
2.TransitionPrompt: This discretion could make you indispensable within a great household as a steward, but you may remain in courtly service instead.
